what_i_do.title: What I actually do
what_i_do.line1: Most systems fail due to wrong decisions, not bad code.
what_i_do.cta: Everything starts with a system diagnosis.

how_i_work.title: How I work
how_i_work.step1_desc: Understand the real problem before touching the system.
how_i_work.step2_desc: Design the correct solution — not just a fix.
how_i_work.step3_desc: Execute only what delivers impact. Nothing else.

work_items.automation_desc: Reduced manual workflows by designing automation pipelines and data systems.
work_items.ai_desc: Designed AI systems for classification, interaction, and decision support.
work_items.embedded_desc: Built production systems across hardware, robotics, and real-time streaming.

contact_situations.title: Typical situations I help with
contact_situations.item1: Too much manual work (Excel, CSV, repetitive processes)
contact_situations.item2: Systems that don't scale under growth
contact_situations.item3: "We want AI but don't know how or where to start"
contact_situations.item4: Existing tools that aren't working as expected
